G0.label:
Φ : Type
inst✝ : DecidableEq Φ
φ : Form Φ
h : Prove φ ↔ ∀ (i : Φ → Prop) (a : DecidablePred i), SC' i [] [] [] [φ]
Pφ : Prove φ
i : Φ → Prop
dec : DecidablePred i
h' : Any (Val i) (φ :: List.map (fun x => ♩x) [])
⊢ Val i φ
